sections.paragraph:
, pl. צִפֳּרִים (as if from צִפֹּרֶת), comm. (f. Pro 27:8 Isa 31:5)-

(1) a small bird, so called from its twittering (see צָפַר No. 3 ), Psa 11:1 104:17 124:7 Job 40:29 Pro 6:5 7:23 specially a sparrow (Arab. عَصْفُورُ with a prefixed guttural), Psa 84:4 Pro 26:2.

(2) a bird, of any kind, Deu 4:17 14:11 Lev 14:4. Collect. birds, Gen 7:14 15:10 .

(3) [Zippor], pr.n. of the father of Balak, king of Moab, Num 4:10 Jos 24:9.
